question_html: Best indirect sentence of the following- Nazneen said, “Farzana, isn’t the soup boiling yet?”

Nazneen asked Farzana if the soup was not boiling by that time.
correct_answer_html: Nazneen asked Farzana if the soup was not boiling by that time.
solution_html:
Direct speech – Present continuous tense;

Indirect speech – past continuous tense;

yet → by that time.
